description: Tell us about yourself to find your perfect match

photos.tip: Tip: recent (last 6 months), at least 1 head-and-shoulders portrait, good lighting, no group shots.

prompts.heading: Profile prompts shown to your matches:
prompts.threeWords: Three words your friends use to describe you:
prompts.funFactPlaceholder: Share a fun fact about yourself

pauseDialog.title: Pause Account
pauseDialog.description: Temporarily hide your profile from new matches. You'll keep your existing matches and dates.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Account
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, including matches and messages, will be permanently removed.
deleteDialog.warningBody: Deleting your account will cancel these dates. Your matches will be notified that the date is cancelled.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters
validation.birthdayFormat: Birthday must be in DD/MM/YYYY format
validation.bioTooLong: Bio must be less than 1000 characters
validation.ageMin: Must be at least 18 years old

geoUnsupported.title: Geolocation not supported
geoUnsupported.description: Your browser doesn't support location services

locationCaptured.title: Location captured
locationCaptured.description: Don't forget to save your profile changes!

locationDenied.title: Location access denied
locationDenied.description: Please choose a city from the dropdown below

locationSet.title: Location set
locationSet.description: Your location has been set to {city}. Don't forget to save your profile changes!

photoLimit.title: Photo limit reached
photoLimit.description: You can only upload up to {limit} photos

fileTooLarge.title: File too large
fileTooLarge.description: Please upload an image smaller than 5MB

fileTooLarge.title: File too large
fileTooLarge.description: Please upload an image smaller than 5MB.

fileTooSmall.title: File looks too small
fileTooSmall.description: Photos under {{minKb}}KB are usually screenshots or thumbnails, not real photos. Please upload a regular photo from your camera roll.

noScreenshots.title: Screenshots aren't allowed
noScreenshots.description: This looks like a screenshot. Please upload a real photo of yourself instead.

photoTooSmall.title: Photo resolution is too low
photoTooSmall.description: This photo is {{width}}×{{height}}. Please upload an image at least {{min}}×{{min}} pixels so your matches can see you clearly.

photoTooDark.title: Photo is too dark
photoTooDark.description: We couldn't see anything in this photo. Please upload a well-lit photo where you're clearly visible.

photoTooFlat.title: Photo looks blank
photoTooFlat.description: This image appears to be a solid colour. Please upload a real photo of yourself.

noFaceFound.title: We couldn't find a face
noFaceFound.description: Your profile photo should clearly show your face. Please upload a photo where you're visible.

locationRequired.title: Location required
locationRequired.description: Please allow location access to continue

photosRequired.title: Photos required
photosRequired.description: Please upload at least {min} photos of yourself :)

accountPaused.title: Account Paused
accountPaused.description: You won't receive new matches until you unpause.

accountActive.title: Account Active
accountActive.description: You are back in the pool for new matches!

accountDeleted.title: Account deleted
accountDeleted.description: Your account has been permanently deleted.
